message:
feat(mvcc): shared memory header module and SHM validation error variants

Add the initial SHM (shared memory) module for cross-process MVCC
coordination, along with five new error variants in lifecycle.rs for
robust SHM header validation:

- ShmTooSmall: header region smaller than expected struct size
- ShmBadMagic: magic bytes don't match expected signature
- ShmVersionMismatch: incompatible SHM protocol version
- ShmInvalidPageSize: page size outside valid power-of-two range
- ShmChecksumMismatch: header checksum fails integrity check

Each variant includes Display impl with descriptive error messages
to aid diagnosis of cross-process coordination failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -75,6 +75,16 @@ pub enum MvccError {
     InvalidState,
     /// TxnId space exhausted.
     TxnIdExhausted,
+    /// SHM buffer too small (< HEADER_SIZE bytes).
+    ShmTooSmall,
+    /// SHM magic bytes do not match `FSQLSHM\0`.
+    ShmBadMagic,
+    /// SHM version field does not match the expected version.
+    ShmVersionMismatch,
+    /// SHM page_size is not a valid power-of-two in \[512, 65536\].
+    ShmInvalidPageSize,
+    /// SHM header checksum does not match recomputed value.
+    ShmChecksumMismatch,
 }
 
 impl std::fmt::Display for MvccError {
@@ -86,6 +96,11 @@ impl std::fmt::Display for MvccError {
             Self::IoErr => write!(f, "SQLITE_IOERR"),
             Self::InvalidState => write!(f, "invalid transaction state"),
             Self::TxnIdExhausted => write!(f, "TxnId space exhausted"),
+            Self::ShmTooSmall => write!(f, "SHM buffer too small"),
+            Self::ShmBadMagic => write!(f, "SHM bad magic"),
+            Self::ShmVersionMismatch => write!(f, "SHM version mismatch"),
+            Self::ShmInvalidPageSize => write!(f, "SHM invalid page size"),
+            Self::ShmChecksumMismatch => write!(f, "SHM checksum mismatch"),
         }
     }
 }
